rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract content.
generic_rules: For component type contracts, place input assumptions and output guarantees only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Ensure AGREE expression types match AADL port or constant types; avoid AADL property names as AGREE variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume/guarantee declarations, equation definitions, and assignment statements within annex agree blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or use subcomponent ports in type-level contracts.
